Clinical chest CT is further affected by limited spatial resolution, partial volume effects, heterogeneous image quality, and respiratory motion artifacts. Unlike deep learning-based pulmonary ves
articles.summary: 针对CT图像中肺动脉树多尺度重建难题，提出多尺度Hessian滤波融合与TEASAR骨架化方法，实现从近端动脉到远端微血管的完整血管树提取，支撑定量肺分析与血管形态评估。

articles.title: PDEFlow: Autonomous Agentic PDE Pipelines for Neural Operator Learning and Solver-Free Inference
articles.excerpt: We present PDEFlow, an autonomous agentic framework that turns user-level ODE and PDE descriptions into solver-backed neural-operator pipelines. The workflow links problem specification, data generation, operator training, and checkpoint-based inference. A stateful input graph converts multi-turn natural-language input and user edits into validated problem specifications. The data-generation module then samples parameters, solves the configured governing-equation with FEniCSx finite-element back
articles.summary: PDEFlow提出自主智能体框架，将用户用自然语言描述的ODE/PDE问题自动转化为基于求解器的神经算子管线，涵盖问题规范、数据生成、算子训练与检查点推理，实现无求解器的端到端推断。

articles.title: Approximate Feedback Linearization for a Nonlinear Hyperbolic PDE Class -- Part II: Neural Operator
articles.excerpt: Volterra series feedback linearizes a class of nonlinear hyperbolic PDEs but produces a controller that, even after truncation, demands solving a tower of plant-specific kernel PDEs and evaluating nested integrals. We prove the truncated controller is jointly Lipschitz in plant and state, and learn it as a single neural operator from plant nonlinearity and state to boundary control. Once trained, no kernel is ever solved again, for any plant in the trained class. The closed loop is practically s
articles.summary: 针对非线性双曲PDE的Volterra级数反馈线性化控制器计算复杂问题，证明截断控制器在状态和系统参数上联合Lipschitz，并采用神经算子学习近似，显著降低在线计算成本。

articles.title: Quadrature-Aware Complex-Linear Neural Operator for Boundary-to-Field Prediction in Resonant Acoustics
articles.excerpt: Repeated prediction of acoustic fields from spatially distributed boundary excitation is computationally expensive when each source realization requires a new wave simulation. This work introduces a quadrature-aware complex-linear boundary operator (CLBO) that maps complex normal velocity on a vibrating surface to complex pressure at receiver locations. articles.summary: 针对大气粗网格到局部PM2.5超分中像素均值与离散站点观测不匹配的问题，提出站点引导伪监督方法，利用地面站点数据生成伪标签，训练超分辨率模型，提升局部空气质量预测的空间分辨率。

articles.title: PulmoSight-XAI: An Explainable Multi-View Attention Ensemble with Gradient Boosting Meta-Learning for Multi-Label Chest X-Ray Classification
articles.excerpt: Automated chest X-ray classification remains challenging due to severe class imbalance, co-occurring pathologies, and the loss of localized features in conventional architectures. To address these, we propose an explainable hierarchical multi-view ensemble framework for the robust classification of 14 thoracic pathologies. The framework employs view-specific training by independently modeling frontal and lateral radiographs using an ensemble of five complementary convolutional neural networks. R
articles.summary: 针对胸部X光多标签分类中类别不平衡、共现病理和局部特征丢失问题，提出PulmoSight-XAI可解释多视图注意力集成框架，结合梯度提升元学习，实现鲁棒分类并提供决策解释。

articles.title: FSDC-DETR: A Frequency-Spatial Domain Collaborative DETR for Small Object Detection
articles.excerpt: Small object detection (SOD) remains a challenging task in real-world applications. Despite recent advances, existing detectors remain limited by rigid processing that entangle spatial aggregation with implicit frequency aliasing and truncation, leading to inadequate preservation of high-frequency components for SOD. articles.summary: 针对小目标检测中空间聚合与隐式频率混叠截断导致高频信息丢失的问题，提出FSDC-DETR，协同频率-空间域特征，在DETR框架下增强小目标细节保留，提升检测精度。

articles.title: Uncertainty-aware damage identification in short-span bridges via physics-informed variational autoencoder
articles.excerpt: Vibration-based damage identification in civil infrastructure is a challenging, ill-posed inverse problem due to measurement noise, sparse sensor arrays, and environmental variability.
